description: Returns a list of tokens on the network.

parameters.name: account.id
parameters.description: The ID of the account to return information for

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Partial or full token name. Not allowed to be used with token.id or account.id parameter. Pagination is not supported with the use of this parameter and results are ordered by token.id with respect to the order parameter.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed

parameters.name: publickey
parameters.description: The public key to compare against

parameters.name: token.id
parameters.description: The ID of the token to return information for
